# Tony Kipkemboi

> AI Engineer and Content Creator. Building AI automations and agent systems. US Army veteran. Speaker at PyCon US, ODSC, Harvard. Former CrewAI, Snowflake, Bloomberg.

## Links

- [Website](https://tonykipkemboi.com)
- [Blog](https://tonykipkemboi.com/blog): Technical articles on AI agents and tutorials
- [Projects](https://tonykipkemboi.com/projects): Open source AI projects
- [Press](https://tonykipkemboi.com/press): Talks, podcasts, and media appearances
- [GitHub](https://github.com/tonykipkemboi)
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@tonykipkemboi)
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/tonykipkemboi)
- [X/Twitter](https://x.com/tonykipkemboi)

## Documentation

- [Full AI-readable content](https://tonykipkemboi.com/llms-full.txt): Complete machine-readable version with all projects, talks, and details

## Top Projects

- [Ollama PDF RAG](https://github.com/tonykipkemboi/ollama_pdf_rag): Chat with PDFs using local LLMs (484 stars)
- [CrewAI Gmail Automation](https://github.com/tonykipkemboi/crewai-gmail-automation): AI-powered email management (175 stars)
- [Resume Optimization Crew](https://github.com/tonykipkemboi/resume-optimization-crew): AI resume optimizer (145 stars)
- [Trip Planner Agent](https://github.com/tonykipkemboi/trip_planner_agent): Multi-agent vacation planner (137 stars)

## Expertise

AI Agents, CrewAI, LangChain, RAG, Python, Streamlit, Local LLMs (Ollama, Groq), Developer Education
